stem: The pseudocode below should keep asking for a number until the user enters a positive number, then print it.
review_notes: Common pupil errors: condition the wrong way round (`num >= 0`), forgetting to re-input inside the loop body. Accept lists allow common operator/whitespace forms.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Complete the pseudocode by filling each gap.

mark_points.text: sentinel value forces loop to run at least once
loop condition rejects zero and negatives

misconceptions.label: Condition reversed
misconceptions.description: Pupils often write `while num >= 0` thinking the loop should run while the number is positive. The loop must run while the input is *not yet* positive.
